negative_variants.description: First Order Sigma Delta Modulator: never emits high bits, so it compiles but fails density and edge-by-edge behavior.
First Order Sigma Delta Modulator: accumulates the input without subtracting feedback, passing clock syntax while saturating the loop.
First Order Sigma Delta Modulator: uses the opposite comparator polarity, producing a plausible stream with inverted loop decisions.
First Order Sigma Delta Modulator: updates on falling clock crossings, so simple toggling works but rising-edge state checks fail.
First Order Sigma Delta Modulator: subtracts only half of the previous feedback bit, leaving density plausible but breaking the certified loop state.
